l a s
s t i틣 r 칮 y틣 s
n 칮 y 칧 k 툺 n
p r e i틣 n a
p r j o u틣 s 톩
p r i틣 l a
p r a u틣 t
p 톩 칧 j a
p 톩 칧 v
p a i틣 t a
p o u틣 p a
t a r k a r
t r e i틣 v
k 콉 톢 t
톝 p
e i n c 톩
l 톝틣 l a
s c 톝 t l a
r e i n t 톩
l e i틣 칧 a
l a v a
l e i n s v a k l 톝틣 톢 a
f 톩 n t p a n t 톩
f j o u틣 칧 톩 r
t a r v a i틣 m 톩
f l t i틣 툺 r
f r 툺 t l퍈 툺틣 s 톩
f r a i틣 r
f r a i틣 r a
f r a i틣 r 톩
k r i틣 n a
k r a 칧 칧 a
s a틣 톢 a
k r e i틣 칧
k r e i틣 칧 a n t l 톝틣 톢 a r
k v 툺 칧 m 툺 칧
k r o u틣 칧 툺 r
h a l t a
h 톝 r t a
p퉗 o u틣 r a
m a u틣 r a
h a i r k 툺 r
r퍈 j 톝틣
h 콉 l t
h 콉 톢 r 툺 r
h u s t
j o u틣 l
c퉗 톝 n틣 a r퍈 k n
m 톖틣 k a
v a 칧 t퉗 a틣 칧
c퉗 톩 n틣 a
l e i틣 k a
f a t l 톝틣 톢 a
l e i틣 r
p l a u틣 r a
o u틣 칧
l i틣 s 톩
l i틣 칧 톩
m a n
m 톩 n틣 a
m e i틣 칧 툺 r
m 톩 h k n a
m a l t j 톝 l t
p퉗 l 툺틣 t 툺 r
s a틣 n a
l a s틣 a
a m s a n t
s c a u m l 톝틣 톢 a
k r a틣 n l a n l 톝틣 톢 a
s 톩 톢 l
s t 톩 i틣 j a
s k r a u틣
l a u틣 t 툺 r
s 톖 f틣 f a
s 톝 n t a n t 톩
s t a p t
s j o u틣 t
s j o u틣 t a n
v 톩 칧
v a i틣 칧 톩
s t r a h k 툺 r
s i틣 r a
o u틣 l
l 톩 f t 톩 n t
r e i틣 t a
t a n t 톩 s t 톩 r t
v a틣 칧 a
v 톝 r t a
v 톝틣 r
v 톝 r퍈 t퉗 a i틣 c 톩
s i틣 v
a u틣 r a
t퉗 o u틣 t 톩
m 콉틣 칧 툺 r
t퉗 i틣 m 톩
s i틣 s a
풪 톝 m a
풪 톝 s틣
풪 톩 칧 j 톩 r
풪 콉 r
